hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; params=json.load(sys.stdin); path=params.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); blocked=['.vault_pass','.envrc','vars/vault.yml','.tfvars']; sys.exit(1) if any(b in path for b in blocked) else sys.exit(0)"

python3 -c "import sys,json,subprocess; params=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=params.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); is_git=cmd.lstrip().startswith('git '); sys.exit(0) if not is_git else None; print('BLOCKED: --no-verify bypasses pre-commit hooks and is never allowed. Fix the hook failures instead.') if '--no-verify' in cmd else None; sys.exit(2) if '--no-verify' in cmd else None; sys.exit(0) if 'git commit' not in cmd else None; r=subprocess.run(['git','rev-parse','--abbrev-ref','HEAD'],capture_output=True,text=True); branch=r.stdout.strip(); print(f'BLOCKED: direct commits to {branch} are not allowed. Use a feature/* branch.') if branch in ('dev','main') else None; sys.exit(2) if branch in ('dev','main') else sys.exit(0)"

python3 -c "import sys,json,subprocess,shutil; params=json.load(sys.stdin); path=params.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); ext=path.rsplit('.',1)[-1] if '.' in path else ''; sys.exit(0) if ext not in ('yml','yaml') else None; yamllint=shutil.which('yamllint'); sys.exit(0) if not yamllint else None; r=subprocess.run([yamllint,'-d','relaxed',path],capture_output=True,text=True); print(r.stdout) if r.stdout else None; print(r.stderr) if r.stderr else None; sys.exit(0)"

python3 -c "import sys,json,subprocess,shutil,os; params=json.load(sys.stdin); path=params.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(0) if not path.endswith('.tf') else None; tf=shutil.which('terraform'); sys.exit(0) if not tf else None; subprocess.run([tf,'fmt',path],capture_output=True); tf_dir=os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(path)); r=subprocess.run([tf,'validate'],capture_output=True,text=True,cwd=tf_dir); print('terraform validate:\n'+r.stdout+r.stderr) if r.returncode!=0 else None; sys.exit(0)"

python3 -c "import sys,json,subprocess,shutil; params=json.load(sys.stdin); path=params.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); ansible_paths=['roles/','group_vars/','main.yml','bootstrap.yml']; sys.exit(0) if not any(p in path for p in ansible_paths) else None; task=shutil.which('task'); sys.exit(0) if not task else None; r=subprocess.run([task,'lint'],capture_output=True,text=True); print(r.stdout) if r.stdout else None; sys.exit(0)"
